name: Bleichroeder Acquisition Corp. I Unit
summary: Bleichroeder Acquisition Corp. I Unit consists of one Class A ordinary share and one-half of one redeemable warrant. Bleichroeder Acquisition Corp. I is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company is based in the United States.
